name: CeCe Winans
abstract: Priscilla Marie Love (born October 8, 1964), known professionally by her stage name as CeCe Winans (), is an American gospel singer who has received 18 Grammy Awards, the most for any female gospel singer; 36 GMA Dove Awards, 28 Stellar Awards, 7 NAACP Image Awards, 6 Billboard Music Awards, and many other awards and honors including bei…

concerts.label: A Night of Inspiration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ruth Brown
about_quotes.evidence: And I like some of the things that BeBe and CeCe Winans are doing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ruth Brown interviewed by Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995
